benefits.description: Weight loss results from low and slow titration protocol

side_effects.description: GI side effects including diarrhea or constipation, mitigated by psyllium husk supplementation

protocol_notes: Detailed titration schedule: Weeks 1-4: 0.5mg weekly; Weeks 5-8: 1mg weekly; Weeks 9-12: 1.5mg weekly; Weeks 13-16: 2mg weekly. Recommends 'low and slow' approach. Advised: protein daily, fiber intake, electrolytes, hydration, psyllium husk for GI support, heavy lifting 3x/week minimum, 8k-10k steps daily. Recommends against split dosing at lower doses.
